description.value:
You slurp residual nutrients as you dissolve those you bite. Whenever you inflict persistent poison damage with your jaws unarmed attack, you gain temporary Hit Points equal to half your level for 1 minute.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Voracious Bite (Temporary Hit Points)]

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.Suskillon Cutoff Shirren] heritage, whenever you inflict persistent poison damage with your jaws unarmed attack, you also gain a +2 status bonus to your next @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Recall Knowledge] check to recall information about creatures with the same trait as the target for the next minute.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Voracious Bite (Recall Knowledge)]
